tests.name: gpu_slot_verification
tests.details: Node 18 (gpu-l40s-01) has 8 GPU slots, all FREE. Each slot: NVIDIA L40S, 44GB. API /gpu-slots/summary returns totalSlots=8, freeSlots=8, allocatedSlots=0, errorSlots=0. API /nodes/18/gpu-slots returns 8 individual slot records (ids 32-39, gpuIndex 0-7).

tests.name: agent_heartbeat_gpu
tests.details: Agent registered with gpuCount=8. Log: [register] INFO - Node registered ID=18, Name=gpu-l40s-01, GPUs=8. Heartbeat 30s interval, pull-based dispatch enabled. Note: Agent port 8090 conflict (Address already in use) but registration and heartbeat work via platform API.

tests.name: single_gpu_inference
tests.details: Task 26758 (runSpec=gpu-1, chipId=952/NVIDIA L40S) completed. QUEUED->DISPATCHED(node18)->COMPLETED in ~3s. Ran on CUDA: MLP-Small bs=8, latency=0.058ms, qps=12474.7, backend=PyTorch-CUDA(NVIDIA L40S). GPU slot 0 allocated and released. Issues: allocatedGpuIndices=null (optimistic lock), gpu_count=8 visible (no CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES isolation).

tests.name: multi_gpu_inference_4x
tests.details: Task 26759 (runSpec=gpu-4, chipId=952/NVIDIA L40S) completed. Backend allocated 4 GPU slots (0-3, version increments confirmed). MLP-Medium bs=16, latency=0.060ms, qps=12169.2, device=cuda. Issues: allocatedGpuIndices=null, gpu_count=8 (all GPUs visible, no CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES set by agent).

tests.name: queue_test
tests.details: 8-GPU task (26761) blocked all slots; 2-GPU task (26762) correctly queued with queuePosition=1, queueReason=waiting for GPU resources (0/8 free, need 2). GET /api/tasks/queue returned queued task info. After 8-GPU task completed, 2-GPU task auto-dispatched and completed. Note: estimatedWaitMinutes defaults to 10min due to SQL GROUP BY bug.

tests.name: frontend_check
tests.details: HTTP 200, 774 bytes, 1 static/js bundle found. Frontend loads without white screen.

known_issues.description: Agent does not set CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES when executing tasks. All 8 GPUs visible to every task regardless of runSpec.gpuPerNode. GPU isolation only at backend scheduling level, not runtime.
allocatedGpuIndices always null on task records due to optimistic lock exceptions during dispatch transaction.
Queue estimatedWaitMinutes defaults to 10min due to SQL error in avg duration calculation (GROUP BY clause issue).
Agent port 8090 conflict on GPU node. HTTP server fails but API-based registration/heartbeat works.
CreateTaskRequest missing runSpecId/runSpecCode fields. Must set via DB or Plan association.
